alerts.title: Qatar intercepts Iranian drone attack
alerts.description: Qatar's Ministry of Defense announces that the state was attacked by a number of drones from Iran on Sunday. Qatari armed forces successfully intercepted all drones with God's blessing.

alerts.title: Iranian Drone Attack on Qatar Intercepted
alerts.description: Qatar Ministry of Defense announces Iranian drone attack on Saturday, with armed forces successfully intercepting all drones

alerts.title: Iranian Ballistic Missile Attack on Qatar
alerts.description: Qatar Ministry of Defense announces ballistic missile attack from Iran targeting Ras Laffan Industrial City, causing damage

alerts.title: Qatar Intercepts Iranian Ballistic Missiles
alerts.description: Qatar's Ministry of Defence announces successful interception of 2 ballistic missiles launched by Iran targeting Ras Laffan Industrial City

alerts.title: Iranian Ballistic Missile Attack on Qatar
alerts.description: Qatar attacked with 5 ballistic missiles from Iran, 4 intercepted, 1 impacted Ras Laffan Industrial City causing fire

alerts.title: Qatar intercepts missile attack
alerts.description: Qatar Ministry of Defense announces armed forces successfully intercepted missile attack targeting Qatar

alerts.title: Iranian Ballistic Missile and Drone Attack on Qatar
alerts.description: Qatar Ministry of Defence reports Iranian attack with 9 ballistic missiles and drones, all successfully intercepted by Qatari armed forces

alerts.title: Second Wave of Missiles Intercepted
alerts.description: Qatar Armed Forces successfully intercepted a second wave of missile attacks targeting the State of Qatar

alerts.title: Qatar Armed Forces Intercept Missile Attack

alerts.title: Iranian Ballistic Missile and Drone Attack on Qatar
alerts.description: Qatar was attacked with 14 ballistic missiles and a number of drones from Iran. Armed forces successfully intercepted all drones and 13 ballistic missiles, with one missile impacting.

alerts.title: Second Wave of Missiles Intercepted
alerts.description: Qatar's Armed Forces successfully intercepted a second wave of missile attacks targeting the State of Qatar

alerts.title: Iranian Attack on Qatar
alerts.description: Qatar attacked with 9 ballistic missiles and drones from Iran. Armed forces successfully intercepted all drones and 8 ballistic missiles, with one missile falling in an unpopulated area.

alerts.title: Qatar Successfully Intercepts 5 Iranian Ballistic Missiles
alerts.description: Qatar's Ministry of Defence reports that 5 ballistic missiles launched from Iran this Tuesday afternoon were successfully intercepted by Qatari armed forces with no casualties reported.

alerts.title: Qatar intercepts Iranian ballistic missiles and drones
alerts.description: Qatar's Ministry of Defence reports successful interception of 17 ballistic missiles and 6 drones launched by Iran, with no casualties recorded
